calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for request for default judgment against Defendant Global Transportations & Services LLC aka Global Transportation & Services DBA Global Transport.

Dept: 505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:17:39 a.m. and concluding at 9:22:46 a.m. (D505)

Tiffanie Brown, Esq. representing Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.
Defendant Global Transportations & Services LLC aka Global Transportation & Services DBA Global Transport not appearing.
Omar Rose, sworn to testify on behalf of the Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's complaint for Money filed Aug-15-2023.
Proof of substituted service as to Defendant Global Transportations & Services LLC aka Global Transportation & Services DBA Global Transport on Oct-04-2023; service effectuated on Sep-30-2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Global Transportations & Services LLC aka Global Transportation & Services DBA Global Transport on Nov-29-2023.
Dismissal filed as to Does 1 through 10, inclusive on Jan-22-2024.

Counsel to summarize the causes of action and to offer proof of as to witness testimony.
Witness is called to testify.
Witness confirms that counsel's statements, declarations and exhibits submitted are true and correct to the best of his knowledge.

Based on the testimony, declarations and filed exhibits, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has met their prima facie case.
The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. and against Defendant Global Transportations & Services LLC aka Global Transportation & Services DBA Global Transport as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from Defendant:
Damages $32,491.39
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $525.17
Interest $0
Total Judgment $ 35,841.56

Proposed judgment is signed and executed this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2024 Continued To Jul-10-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-22-2024 Continued To May-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for motion for default judgment against Defendant Global Transportations & Services LLC aka Global Transportation & Services dba Global Transport.

Dept.505: Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:36:01 a.m. and concluding at 9:37:51a.m. (D505)

Tiffanie Brown, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Global Transportations & Services LLC aka Global Transportation & Services dba Global Transport not appearing.
Witness Benjamin Seeman sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Counsel apologizes to the Court as there are some discrepancies in the exhibits and witness present is not the person who can testify as to the exhibits.

Counsel requests a continuance of the matter.

Court grants the request to continue.

The matter for motion for default judgment against Defendant Global Transportations & Services LLC aka Global Transportation & Services dba Global Transport is continued to May 22, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. at Dept. 505.

Plaintiff to serve and file the served notice with the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2023 Continued To May-15-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
